An overview of guis

16 Jun 2019

GUI
Bootstrap JavaFX Gluon

The Graphical User Interface is a programmer’s foward facing representative. Each platform has a different design philosophy based on the language of choice and intended user. The frontend medias that are popular today are Websites , Mobile Applications , and Desktop Applications .

Websites

I will keep this fairly brief. HTML, CSS, and Javascript are the keystones of all websites. HTML is the organization of the page. HTML is a spin off of XML which is a more generalizable Markup Language. XML is used in Maven .pom files for those who are familiar with Java build tools. CSS stylizes yoru website, adding visual panache to your elements. You can change colors, shift around elements, and even do animations in CSS.

Learn CSS here

W3 Schools

This course goes over all the necessary basics of CSS
Javascript is our scripting component and where CS truly merges with Web Design. Javascript is a bit of a black sheep in the programming world, and although it is beloved by Web Designers it is equally disdained by some Software Engineers. Efforts have been made to improve Javascript in different ways via AngularJS, ReactJS, and VueJS. ### Mobile Applications There are two major mobile application platforms, Android and iOS.
